DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JENNY CHUN'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED AND DENIED AS FOLLOWS. AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 1-10, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS' OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED EXCEPT AS TO PREMATURE DISCLOSURE OF EXPERT OPINIONS. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO PROVIDE CODE-COMPLAINT RESPONSES FROM THEIR PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE, IF ANY. AS TO RFPS 5-14, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS' OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED EXCEPT AS TO PREMATURE DISCLOSURE OF EXPERT OPINIONS. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO PROVIDE CODE-COMPLAINT RESPONSES FROM THEIR PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, IF ANY. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Jan-19-2017 Continued To Jan-30-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS EDWIN SEE AND LISA SEE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT will be heard in Department 501, the real property/housing court, at 9:30 am on January 30, 2017. All future law and motion matters in this case must be noticed to be heard in department 501.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Blake Bostwick of Bostwick & Peterson, LLP telephone number 415-421-8300 for Plaintiff Jenny Chun.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Jenny Chun's Motion To Amend The Complaint is granted. Defendants fled a statement of non-opposition. The court will sign the proposed order submitted with the moving papers after striking the inapplicable language including that the first amended complaint is deemed filed. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF JENNY CHUN's Motion To Compel is GRANTED and DENIED as follows. As to Special Interrogatories 1-10, plaintiff's motion is GRANTED. Defendants' Objections are overruled except as to premature disclosure of expert opinions. Defendants are ordered to provide code-complaint responses from their personal knowledge, if any. As to RFPs 5-14, plaintiff's motion is GRANTED. Defendants' Objections are overruled except as to premature disclosure of expert opinions. Defendants are ordered to provide code-complaint responses from their personal knowledge and responsive documents, if any. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)
